Task.title: Task
Task.description: A user-defined task to be completed.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this task.

description.description: A detailed description of the task.

completedAt.description: The time the task was completed.

dueDate.description: The due date of the task.

createdAt.description: The time the task was created.

updatedAt.description: The time the task was last updated.

Routine.title: Routine
Routine.description: A structured daily routine generated by AI or manually.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this routine.

wake_time.description: The wake-up time for this routine.

sleep_time.description: The sleep time for this routine.

total_duration_min.description: The total duration of the routine in minutes.

blocks.description: The blocks of time in the routine.

habits.description: The habits scheduled within the routine.

isActive.description: Whether the routine is currently active.

assignedDays.description: The days of the week the routine is assigned to.

linkedAlarm.description: The ID of the alarm linked to this routine.

createdAt.description: The time the routine was created.

updatedAt.description: The time the routine was last updated.

Habit.title: Habit
Habit.description: A habit to be tracked daily, weekly, or custom.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this habit.

currentStreak.description: The current streak of the habit.

longestStreak.description: The longest streak of the habit.

logs.description: The logs of the habit completion.

createdAt.description: The time the habit was created.

Alarm.title: Alarm
Alarm.description: An alarm set by the user, potentially linked to a routine.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this alarm.

time.description: The time the alarm is set for.

isActive.description: Whether the alarm is currently active.

routineId.description: The ID of the routine linked to this alarm.

days.description: The days of the week the alarm is set for.

createdAt.description: The time the alarm was created.

Goal.title: Goal
Goal.description: A goal set by the user to track progress.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this goal.

description.description: A detailed description of the goal.

target_value.description: The target value for the goal.

current_value.description: The current value for the goal.

createdAt.description: The time the goal was created.

updatedAt.description: The time the goal was last updated.

darkMode.description: Whether the user has dark mode enabled.

notifications.description: Whether the user has notifications enabled.

theme.description: The theme selected by the user.

onboardingCompleted.description: Whether the user has completed onboarding.

agreedToTerms.description: Whether the user has agreed to the terms.

lastSkipReset.description: The last time the skip count was reset.

updatedAt.description: The last time the settings were updated.
